response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned generalist software engineer with strong web/backend experience (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang), but the role specifically requires a C++ developer with deep expertise in STL, multi-threading, message brokers, MQTT, and industrial cybersecurity (IEC 62443). C++ exposure is limited to a ~6-month stint at National Instruments over a decade ago and a bachelor thesis. There is no evidence of industrial automation, SDL/IEC 62443, MQTT, or relevant protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, etc.). Profile is misaligned with core requirements.
strengths: 10+ years of professional software engineering experience across diverse stacks
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, mentoring, workshops)
concerns: Minimal recent C++/STL experience; C++ not even listed in current skills
No exposure to IEC 62443, SDL, or industrial cybersecurity standards
No background in industrial automation, MQTT, or relevant OT protocols

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering and distributed-systems experience
